zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu於1215年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，她的父親Máel Coluim Earl of Angus25歲，母親Mary Maud Berkeley16歲。她於1243年與Gilbert Umfraville在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1261年在英國諾圖波藍德卡素享年46歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu于1215年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，她的父亲Máel Coluim Earl of Angus25岁，母亲Mary Maud Berkeley16岁。她于1243年与Gilbert Umfraville在英国諾圖波藍德普盧多结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1261年在英国諾圖波藍德卡素享年46岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from the county and earldom of Angus in Scotland, or from the Gaelic personal name Aonghus, said to be composed of Celtic aon ‘one’ + gus ‘choice’. This was borne by an early Celtic deity and prominent mythological figure, and a famous 8th-century Pictish king.

variants.name: Kennis
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form Mac Aenghuis ‘son of Aenghus’ (see Angus ).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Kene (of uncertain origin) + the Yiddish possessive suffix -s.

variants.name: Hennessy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Declan, Brendan, Dermot, Donal, Fidelma, Fintan, Liam, Mairead, Sean Patrick.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAonghusa ‘descendant of Aonghus’; see Angus , and compare McGinnis .

variants.name: Anguish
meanings: Scottish and English: from an English mishearing of the Scottish Gaelic personal name Aonghus, see Angus and McAninch .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu was born in 1215, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Máel Coluim Earl of Angus, was 25 and her mother, Mary Maud Berkeley, was 16. She married Gilbert Umfraville in 1243, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1261, in Castle, Northumberland, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Hexham, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu est née en 1215, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Máel Coluim Earl of Angus, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Maud Berkeley, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Umfraville en 1243, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1261, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu 1215 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Máel Coluim Earl of Angus 25 und ihre Mutter Mary Maud Berkeley 16. Sie hat 1243 in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England Gilbert Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1261 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Castle, Northumberland, England und wurde in Hexham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu è nata il nel 1215 nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Máel Coluim Earl of Angus, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mary Maud Berkeley, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Umfraville nel 1243, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1261, nel Castle, Northumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Hexham, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Angus Countess of Anguが1215年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父Máel Coluim Earl of Angusは25歳，母Mary Maud Berkeleyは16歳であった。1243年にイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオでGilbert Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1261年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで46歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu(이)가 1215년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Máel Coluim Earl of Angus(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Maud Berkeley(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1243년 영국 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 Gilbert Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu nasceu em 1215, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Máel Coluim Earl of Angus, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Maud Berkeley, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Umfraville em 1243, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1261, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu родилась в 1215 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Máel Coluim Earl of Angus было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Maud Berkeley, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Umfraville в 1243 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1261 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu nació en 1215, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Máel Coluim Earl of Angus, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Maud Berkeley, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Gilbert Umfraville en 1243, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1261, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
